## Summary

**Task: Add JSON and YAML import support** — ✅ Completed

The feature was already fully implemented in commit `9b43107` from a previous session. I verified all acceptance criteria:

| Criterion | Status | Evidence |
|-----------|--------|----------|
| Detects format by extension | ✅ | `detectFileFormat()` maps `.md`/`.txt`→markdown, `.json`→json, `.yaml`/`.yml`→yaml (case-insensitive) |
| Parses JSON input files | ✅ | `extractJsonItems()` + `parseStr
